Class LobbedFireAttack

java.lang.Object
logic.unit.strategy.tactic.LobbedAttack
logic.unit.strategy.tactic.LobbedFireAttack
All Implemented Interfaces:
Describable, AttackStrategy
public class LobbedFireAttack extends LobbedAttack
An elemental artillery strategy that combines high-arc targeting with fire damage. Units using this strategy can bypass obstacles to ignite specific grid locations, dealing immediate damage and applying a lingering Burn effect to any victims.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface logic.unit.strategy.tactic.AttackStrategy

  • Constructor Details

    • LobbedFireAttack

      public LobbedFireAttack()
      Default constructor for initializing the Flame Toss attack. Inherits the default minimum range of 2 from the parent LobbedAttack.

    • LobbedFireAttack

      public LobbedFireAttack(int minAttackRange)
      Parameterized constructor to define a custom minimum attack range for the fire lob.
      Parameters:
      minAttackRange - The minimum distance (inclusive) required to target a tile.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Retrieves the display name of this elemental artillery tactic.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface Describable
      Overrides:
      getName in class LobbedAttack
      Returns:
      The string "Flame Toss".

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Retrieves the tooltip description explaining the fire-based artillery mechanics.
      Specified by:
      getDescription in interface Describable
      Overrides:
      getDescription in class LobbedAttack
      Returns:
      A string detailing the lobbing behavior, tile ignition, and Burn status.

    • applyEffects

      public void applyEffects(Tile attacker, Tile target)
      Executes the combat logic, layering environmental ignition over artillery damage. The target tile is ignited upon impact. If a unit is present, it suffers immediate physical damage and a 3-turn Burn effect.
      Specified by:
      applyEffects in interface AttackStrategy
      Overrides:
      applyEffects in class LobbedAttack
      Parameters:
      attacker - The tile occupied by the unit initiating the Flame Toss.
      target - The specific tile where the fire projectile lands.

    • playSound

      public void playSound(String unitID, double volume)
      Triggers the fire-specific audio feedback for this lobbed attack strategy.
      Specified by:
      playSound in interface AttackStrategy
      Overrides:
      playSound in class LobbedAttack
      Parameters:
      unitID - The identifier for the unit (unused as the fire sound is universal).
      volume - The audio level for playback.
